{{ preview_state.status }}
{% endif %} {% if site_theme and site_theme.partials and site_theme.partials.header %} {% include site_theme.partials.header %} {% else %} {% include "site/partials/header.html" %} {% endif %}
{% block content %}{% endblock %}
{% if site_theme and site_theme.partials and site_theme.partials.footer %} {% include site_theme.partials.footer %} {% else %} {% include "site/partials/footer.html" %} {% endif %} {% if site_theme and site_theme.bundle_urls and site_theme.bundle_urls.site_js %} {% endif %} {% block scripts %}{% endblock %}
